why_it_matters: Utility insecurity is a PRAPARE-captured social need that could trigger additional resource referrals and completes this SDOH-focused visit's documentation.
An overdue tetanus booster actually administered today must be recorded to maintain an accurate immunization record and prevent duplicate dosing.
Documenting side-effect counseling confirms informed consent and sets patient expectations, though clinical impact if omitted is low.
The PRAPARE stress rating supports and quantifies the documented financial-stress assessment but adds little to management decisions.
